# src

Pipeline execution engine orchestrating DOT-defined graphs through async node handlers with checkpoint resume, CSS-like styling, and validation.

## Contents

### Core Execution

- [engine.rs](./engine.rs) - `PipelineExecutor` with `run()`, `run_with_context()`, `run_with_checkpoint()` methods; enforces `max_steps=200` and `max_budget_usd=200.0` limits via `KEY_MAX_STEPS` and `KEY_MAX_BUDGET_USD` context keys; drives 5-phase traversal loop with goal gate validation and `EventEmitter` broadcast
- [handler.rs](./handler.rs) - `NodeHandler` async trait, `DynHandler` object-safe wrapper, `HandlerRegistry` with `resolve_type()` priority (explicit `node_type` > shape mapping > `"codergen"` default); `StartHandler`, `ExitHandler`, `ConditionalHandler`; `default_registry()` maps `"Mdiamond"`→`"start"`, `"Msquare"`→`"exit"`, `"box"`→`"codergen"`, `"hexagon"`→`"wait.human"`, `"diamond"`→`"conditional"`, `"component"`→`"parallel"`, `"tripleoctagon"`→`"parallel.fan_in"`, `"parallelogram"`→`"tool"`, `"house"`→`"stack.manager_loop"`
- [events.rs](./events.rs) - `PipelineEvent` enum with 10 variants (`PipelineStarted`, `StageCompleted`, `EdgeSelected`, `CheckpointSaved`, etc.); `EventEmitter` wrapping `tokio::sync::broadcast::Sender` with default capacity `256`

### Graph Structure & Routing

- [graph.rs](./graph.rs) - `PipelineGraph` with adjacency-indexed `edges: Vec<PipelineEdge>` and `adjacency: HashMap<String, (usize, usize)>` for O(1) outgoing edge slices; `PipelineNode` with 16 fields including `goal_gate: bool`, `retry_target: Option<String>`, `timeout: Option<Duration>`, `llm_model: Option<String>`; `from_dot()` construction layering graph/subgraph/node defaults; `start_node()` resolves `Mdiamond` shape or `"start"/"Start"` ID; `exit_node()` resolves `Msquare` shape
- [edge_selection.rs](./edge_selection.rs) - `select_edge()` implements 5-priority fallback: condition-evaluated edges → `outcome.preferred_label` match via `normalize_label()` → `outcome.suggested_next_ids` match → unconditional edges ranked by descending `weight` with lexical `to` tiebreak via `best_by_weight_then_lexical()` → final `edges.first()` fallback
- [condition.rs](./condition.rs) - `ConditionExpr` struct holding `Vec<Clause>`; `Clause` with `key: String`, `operator: Operator` (`Eq`/`NotEq`), `value: String`; `parse_condition()` implements grammar `Clause ( '&&' Clause )*` with dot-notation keys and quoted/bare literals; `evaluate_condition()` with resolver closure `Fn(&str) -> String`; empty input evaluates to `true`

### State Management & Resilience

- [checkpoint.rs](./checkpoint.rs) - `PipelineCheckpoint` struct with `current_node_id: String`, `completed_nodes: Vec<String>`, `node_outcomes: HashMap<String, attractor_types::Outcome>`, `context_snapshot: HashMap<String, serde_json::Value>`, RFC 3339 `timestamp: String`, `session_id: Option<String>`; `save_checkpoint()` atomic write via `checkpoint.json.tmp` → `tokio::fs::rename` to `checkpoint.json`; `load_checkpoint()` returns `Ok(None)` for missing file; `clear_checkpoint()` idempotent deletion
- [retry.rs](./retry.rs) - `BackoffPolicy` enum with `Fixed(Duration)`, `Exponential { base: Duration, max: Duration }`, `None` variants; `delay_for_attempt()` calculates exponential delay as `base.as_millis() * 2^attempt` capped at `max`; `execute_with_retry()` closure execution with `max_retries + 1` attempts, triggering on `StageStatus::Retry` or `AttractorError::is_retryable()`; `RetriesExhausted` error on failure
- [goal_gate.rs](./goal_gate.rs) - `GoalGateResult` with `all_satisfied: bool`, `failed_node_id: Option<String>`, `retry_target: Option<String>`; `check_goal_gates()` validates `goal_gate=true` nodes achieved `StageStatus::Success` or `StageStatus::PartialSuccess`; `resolve_retry_target()` implements 4-level fallback: `node.retry_target` → `node.fallback_retry_target` → `graph.attrs["retry_target"]` → `graph.attrs["fallback_retry_target"]`

### Validation & Styling

- [validation.rs](./validation.rs) - `validate()` instantiates 12 `LintRule` implementations (`StartNodeRule`, `TerminalNodeRule`, `ReachabilityRule`, `EdgeTargetExistsRule`, `StartNoIncomingRule`, `ExitNoOutgoingRule`, `ConditionSyntaxRule`, `FidelityValidRule`, `RetryTargetExistsRule`, `GoalGateHasRetryRule`, `ProviderValidRule`, `PromptOnLlmNodesRule`); `Diagnostic` struct with `rule: String`, `severity: Severity` (`Error`/`Warning`/`Info`), `message: String`, optional `node_id` and `edge` tuple; `validate_or_raise()` converts `Severity::Error` diagnostics to `AttractorError::ValidationError`
- [stylesheet.rs](./stylesheet.rs) - `Stylesheet` containing `Vec<Rule>`; `Rule` with `selector: Selector` (`Universal`/`Id(String)`/`Class(String)`), `declarations: Vec<Declaration>`; `specificity()` returns `0` for `Universal`, `1` for `Class`, `2` for `Id`; `parse_stylesheet()` with comment support (`//`, `/* */`); `apply_stylesheet()` populates only `None` fields (`llm_model`, `llm_provider`, `reasoning_effort`) sorted by specificity ascending
- [transforms.rs](./transforms.rs) - `apply_transforms()` sequential execution: `apply_model_stylesheet` (extracts `model_stylesheet` from `graph.attrs`) then `expand_prompt_variables`; `expand_variables()` brute-force `${key}` substitution via `format!("${{{}}}", key)` against `HashMap<String, String>` leaving unmatched literals intact

### Human Interaction

- [interviewer.rs](./interviewer.rs) - `Interviewer` async trait with `ask(&self, &Question) -> Result<Answer>`; `Question` struct with `prompt`, `choices`, `default`, `timeout`; `Answer` with `choice`, `custom_text`; `AutoApproveInterviewer` selects default or first choice; `ConsoleInterviewer` displays 1-indexed menu `"  [{}] {}"` and parses `usize` input; `RecordingInterviewer` LIFO stack playback from `Vec<Answer>` with `Mutex` interior mutability

### Module Interface

- [lib.rs](./lib.rs) - Public exports: `PipelineExecutor`, `PipelineConfig`, `PipelineResult`, `PipelineGraph`, `PipelineNode`, `PipelineEdge`, `NodeHandler`, `DynHandler`, `HandlerRegistry`, `StartHandler`, `ExitHandler`, `ConditionalHandler`, `PipelineEvent`, `EventEmitter`, `ConditionExpr`, `parse_condition`, `evaluate_condition`, `PipelineCheckpoint`, `save_checkpoint`, `load_checkpoint`, `clear_checkpoint`, `check_goal_gates`, `enforce_goal_gates`, `GoalGateResult`, `BackoffPolicy`, `execute_with_retry`, `Stylesheet`, `parse_stylesheet`, `apply_stylesheet`, `apply_transforms`, `validate`, `validate_or_raise`, `Diagnostic`, `Severity`, `Interviewer`, `Question`, `Answer`, `AutoApproveInterviewer`, `ConsoleInterviewer`, `RecordingInterviewer`

## Subdirectories

- [handlers/](./handlers/) - Handler implementations: `CodergenHandler`, `ToolHandler`, `ParallelHandler`, `FanInHandler`, `ManagerLoopHandler`, `WaitHumanHandler` implementing `NodeHandler` trait with shape-based activation and timeout defaults (600s codergen, 300s tool)

## Architecture

DOT parsing via `attractor_dot::parse` → `PipelineGraph::from_dot()` construction → `validate_or_raise()` structural validation → `apply_transforms()` (stylesheet application + variable expansion) → `PipelineExecutor::run_inner()` execution loop:

1. Checkpoint resume via `load_checkpoint()` or fresh context initialization
2. Handler resolution via `HandlerRegistry::resolve_type()` (priority: explicit `node_type` attribute > shape mapping > `"codergen"` default)
3. Async execution wrapped in `tokio::time::timeout()` when `node.timeout` present
4. Edge selection via `select_edge()` with condition evaluation against context snapshot
5. Goal gate validation via `enforce_goal_gates()` triggering retry loops via `retry_target` or returning `AttractorError::GoalGateUnsatisfied`
6. Checkpoint persistence via `save_checkpoint()` after each node completion with `current_node.id` as next-to-execute
7. Terminal detection (`shape == "Msquare"`) triggers `ExitHandler` execution and `clear_checkpoint()` cleanup

## Behavioral Contracts

### Checkpoint Persistence

- Atomic write pattern: content written to `<logs_root>/checkpoint.json.tmp`, then renamed via `tokio::fs::rename` to `checkpoint.json`
- Timestamp format: RFC 3339 via `chrono::Utc::now().to_rfc3339()`
- Serialization: `serde_json::to_string_pretty` with `#[serde(skip_serializing_if = "Option::is_none")]` on `session_id`
- Backward compatibility: missing `session_id` field deserializes to `None`

### Condition Grammar

- Syntax: `ConditionExpr ::= Clause ( '&&' Clause )*`
- Clause: `Key Operator Literal` where `Key ::= identifier ('.' identifier)*` (dot notation for nested access)
- Operators: `=` (equality), `!=` (inequality)
- Literals: quoted strings (`"..."` or `'...'`), bare words, integers, booleans
- Empty or whitespace-only input parses to zero-clause expression evaluating to `true`

### Edge Selection Priority

1. Condition-evaluated edges: `parse_condition()` → `evaluate_condition()` using context resolver → `best_by_weight_then_lexical()`
2. Label match: `normalize_label(outcome.preferred_label)` compared to `edge.label`
3. Suggestion match: `edge.to` present in `outcome.suggested_next_ids` vector
4. Weight/lexical: unconditional edges ranked by descending `weight`, tiebroken by ascending lexical `to` field
5. Fallback: `edges.first()` for terminal nodes

### Label Normalization

- Regex: `r"^(?:\[\w\]\s*|\w\)\s*|\w-\s*)"` (matches `[X] `, `X) `, `X- ` accelerator prefixes)
- Transform: trim → lowercase → strip regex matches

### Safety Limits

- `KEY_MAX_STEPS="max_steps"`: default `200`, enforced via `step_count` increment per loop iteration; exceedance returns `AttractorError::Other` with message "Pipeline exceeded maximum step count (200). Use --max-steps to increase."
- `KEY_MAX_BUDGET_USD="max_budget_usd"`: default `200.0`, enforced via `total_cost` aggregation from `format!("{}.cost_usd", current_node.id)` context keys; negative or NaN costs skipped with warning; exceedance returns `AttractorError::Other` with message "Pipeline exceeded budget ($X > $200.00). Use --max-budget-usd to increase."

### Retry Target Resolution (4-level fallback)

1. `node.retry_target` (explicit node attribute)
2. `node.fallback_retry_target` (node fallback attribute)
3. `graph.attrs.get("retry_target")` matched as `AttributeValue::String(s)`
4. `graph.attrs.get("fallback_retry_target")` matched as `AttributeValue::String(s)`

### Stylesheet Specificity & Application

- `Selector::specificity()` returns: `Universal` → `0`, `Class` → `1`, `Id` → `2`
- Rules sorted ascending by specificity; later declarations overwrite earlier at same specificity
- Application only populates `None` fields on `PipelineNode`: `llm_model`, `llm_provider`, `reasoning_effort`; explicit values are never overwritten

### Shape-to-Type Mapping

- `"Mdiamond"` → `"start"`
- `"Msquare"` → `"exit"`
- `"box"` → `"codergen"`
- `"hexagon"` → `"wait.human"`
- `"diamond"` → `"conditional"`
- `"component"` → `"parallel"`
- `"tripleoctagon"` → `"parallel.fan_in"`
- `"parallelogram"` → `"tool"`
- `"house"` → `"stack.manager_loop"`

### Terminal Detection

- `shape == "Msquare"` or node ID in `{"exit", "end", "done"}` identifies terminal nodes
- Terminal nodes with outgoing edges trigger `ExitNoOutgoingRule` validation error

### Variable Expansion

- Pattern: `${key}` constructed via `format!("${{{}}}", key)` in `expand_variables()`
- Unmatched variables remain literal in output string (no error)
- Source variables drawn from all graph-level attributes (`String`, `Integer`, `Boolean`, `Float` variants; `Duration` skipped)

### Validation Rules (12 built-in)

- `StartNodeRule`: exactly one node with `is_start_node` (shape `Mdiamond` or ID `start`/`Start`)
- `TerminalNodeRule`: at least one node with `is_terminal_node` (shape `Msquare` or ID `exit`/`end`/`done`)
- `ReachabilityRule`: BFS from start node visits all nodes; unvisited nodes emit error
- `EdgeTargetExistsRule`: all edge `to` fields reference existing node IDs
- `StartNoIncomingRule`: start node has zero incoming edges
- `ExitNoOutgoingRule`: terminal nodes have zero outgoing edges
- `ConditionSyntaxRule`: all edge `condition` strings parse via `parse_condition()` without error
- `FidelityValidRule`: `fidelity` values match prefixes `full`, `truncate`, `compact`, `summary` with optional `:level` or `(n)` suffixes
- `RetryTargetExistsRule`: `retry_target` and `fallback_retry_target` point to existing node IDs (warning)
- `GoalGateHasRetryRule`: nodes with `goal_gate=true` have `retry_target` defined (warning)
- `ProviderValidRule`: `llm_provider` in `["claude", "anthropic", "codex", "openai", "gemini", "google"]` (warning for unknown)
- `PromptOnLlmNodesRule`: LLM nodes (shapes `box`, `cds`, `component`, `note`) have `prompt` defined when label matches ID (warning)

## File Relationships

- `engine.rs` imports `graph.rs` (`PipelineGraph`, `PipelineNode`), `handler.rs` (`HandlerRegistry`, `DynHandler`), `checkpoint.rs` (`save_checkpoint`, `load_checkpoint`, `clear_checkpoint`), `edge_selection.rs` (`select_edge`), `goal_gate.rs` (`enforce_goal_gates`), `events.rs` (`EventEmitter`, `PipelineEvent`), `retry.rs` (`execute_with_retry`)
- `handler.rs` imports `graph.rs` for node structure; handler implementations in `handlers/` directory implement `NodeHandler` trait defined here
- `transforms.rs` imports `stylesheet.rs` (`Stylesheet`, `parse_stylesheet`, `apply_stylesheet`) and `graph.rs` (`PipelineGraph`)
- `validation.rs` imports `condition.rs` (`parse_condition`) and `graph.rs` (`PipelineGraph`, `PipelineNode`)
- `edge_selection.rs` imports `condition.rs` (`parse_condition`, `evaluate_condition`) and `graph.rs` (`PipelineGraph`, `PipelineEdge`)
- `goal_gate.rs` imports `graph.rs` (`PipelineGraph`, `PipelineNode`) and `attractor_types::Outcome`
- `lib.rs` re-exports all public modules for crate consumers

## Stack

- **Language**: Rust (async/await via `async_trait::async_trait`)
- **Runtime**: `tokio` (filesystem operations, timeouts, broadcast channels, process spawning)
- **Serialization**: `serde`, `serde_json` (pretty-printed checkpoint JSON)
- **DOT parsing**: `attractor_dot` (sibling crate)
- **Types**: `attractor_types` (`Context`, `Outcome`, `AttractorError`, `StageStatus`; sibling crate)
- **Time**: `chrono` (RFC 3339 timestamps)
